name: native-select
visual_summary: The native-select component is a dropdown menu that allows users to select an option from a list of choices. It appears when a user clicks on a button or other trigger, showing a list of options for the user to select from. This component is commonly used when a single value needs to be chosen from a set of options, such as selecting a country or a color from a predefined list.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready input component with the following characteristics:

Name: native-select
Description: The native-select component is a dropdown menu that allows users to select an option from a list of choices. It appears when a user clicks on a button or other trigger, showing a list of options for the user to select from. This component is commonly used when a single value needs to be chosen from a set of options, such as selecting a country or a color from a predefined list.
Style: native, simple
Interactions: open on click, selectable options
Tags: select, dropdown, options

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
